summary: Backend testing completed for CRITICAL PVP Photo Selection Bug Fix. All 3 tests passed. The fix correctly ensures: 1) Each player selects their OWN photo, 2) Status changes to 'tapping' when both select (not auto-winner), 3) Winner determined by who taps more via /pvp/finish-round.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED: /pvp/select-photo endpoint now correctly stores each player's photo in player1_current_photo and player2_current_photo
Status correctly transitions to 'tapping' when both players select (lines 1718-1732 in game_routes.py)
Taps are reset to 0 when both select for fair competition
Winner determination moved to /pvp/finish-round endpoint based on actual tap counts (lines 1969-2042)
Polling fallback correctly shows opponent taps and dollar values via /pvp/tap-state endpoint
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users with minted photos
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL PVP bug fix verified. Full flow tested: create game -> join -> ready -> start -> both select photos -> verify status='tapping' -> both tap -> verify tap sync via polling -> finish round -> verify correct winner by taps. The bug where both players were bidding on joined player's photo only is FIXED.

verification_results.critical_bug_status: FIXED - Each player now selects their OWN photo, winner determined by taps
